<!-- Generated by the read-only scoping workflow wf_50c7fc5a-780 (2026-07-03). THE ready-to-execute
     generalization package: atomized per-card recipe rows + AI roster vocabulary + ONE generic interpreter
     + per-card cutover/deletion plan. Implementation gated on the 10-prompt campaign completing. -->

# V48 GENERALIZATION PACKAGE — roster-recipe rows + one generic interpreter + bespoke-builder deletion

Synthesized from Inventory A (backend builders), B (frontend glue), C (cmd_catalog wiring). All paths verified against the live tree; schema/dispatch points re-verified against the live `cmd_catalog` DB and `host/server.py` / `ems_exec` / `layer2` sources. Everything below is an artifact — nothing was written to the tree or the DB.

---

## 1) DDL + SEED SQL

Two files to add under `/home/rohith/desktop/BFI/backend/layer2/pipeline_v48/db/` (matching the existing `seed_*.sql` convention; apply with `psql`, NOT `data.db_client.q` which is a 2-arg SELECT-only client). Fully idempotent: `CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS` + `ON CONFLICT ... DO UPDATE`.

### 1a. `db/roster_recipe_schema.sql`

```sql
-- cmd_catalog: atomized per-card fill recipes (Inventory C recommendation: card_fill_recipe keyed like card_data_recipe)
BEGIN;

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS card_fill_recipe (
  card_id        integer PRIMARY KEY,
  handling_class text    NOT NULL,          -- panel_aggregate | topology_sld | narrative_ai (denorm for gate speed)
  roster_spec    jsonb   NOT NULL,          -- the executable per-card recipe (vocabulary in §2)
  notes          text,
  source         text    DEFAULT 'inventory-A+B 2026-07-02',
  updated_at     timestamptz DEFAULT now()
);

-- FE per-card wiring metadata (Inventory B recommendation)
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS card_rendering (
  card_id               integer PRIMARY KEY,
  page_key              text,
  render_kind           text NOT NULL CHECK (render_kind IN ('special','components','compose','fill')),
  envelope_kind         text,               -- narrative_ai | asset_3d | topology (SPECIAL only)
  component_alias       text,               -- e.g. 'Cmp7' (COMPONENTS) / import alias — the NAME only; import stays code
  fill_module           text,               -- FILL barrel path relative to host/web/src/cmd/fill/
  payload_shape_category text CHECK (payload_shape_category IN ('single_unwrap','multi_spread','envelope_only') OR payload_shape_category IS NULL),
  payload_single_key    text,               -- e.g. 'heatmap', 'rail', 'strip'
  mapper_key            text,               -- CMD_V2 mapper fn name (e.g. 'mapFrame')
  state_schema          jsonb,              -- {metric:'string', idx:'number', ...}
  state_defaults        jsonb,
  date_control          jsonb,              -- {kind:'sampling_picker'|'none', defaults:{...}}
  honest_blank_reason   text
);

-- shared (NOT card-specific) dataset facts → app_config, per the existing cfg() pattern
INSERT INTO app_config (key, value, data_type, section, note) VALUES
 ('roster.member_columns',
  '["active_power_total_kw","reactive_power_total_kvar","apparent_power_total_kva","kpi_true_pf","power_factor_total","voltage_avg","current_avg","active_energy_import_kwh","current_neutral","kpi_neutral_to_phase_ratio_pct","pf_gap_vs_full_load","harmonic_5th_pct","harmonic_7th_pct","thd_current_r_pct","thd_current_y_pct","thd_current_b_pct","thd_voltage_r_pct","thd_voltage_y_pct","thd_voltage_b_pct","current_unbalance_pct"]',
  'json','roster','the present-tolerant per-member read set (was panel_aggregate.py:41-66 _MEMBER_COLS)'),
 ('roster.sum_columns',
  '["active_power_total_kw","reactive_power_total_kvar","apparent_power_total_kva","current_avg","current_neutral"]',
  'json','roster','extensive Σ-magnitude columns; everything else means (was panel_aggregate.py:69 _SUM_COLS)'),
 ('roster.energy_column','active_energy_import_kwh','text','roster','cumulative counter → windowed-delta'),
 ('roster.interpreter_enabled','off','text','roster','off | shadow | on — the per-card cutover valve (§4)')
ON CONFLICT (key) DO UPDATE SET value = EXCLUDED.value, note = EXCLUDED.note;

COMMIT;
```

### 1b. `db/seed_roster_recipes.sql`

Binding/slot vocabulary is defined in §2. `$j$...$j$::jsonb` dollar-quoting throughout.

```sql
BEGIN;

-- ── card 2 : Single-Line Diagram (topology_sld) ─────────────────────────────────────────────
INSERT INTO card_fill_recipe (card_id, handling_class, roster_spec, notes) VALUES
(2, 'topology_sld', $j$
{
 "coverage_attach": "widgets._coverage",
 "slots": [
  {"slot":"widgets.sld.incoming[]","mode":"elements","scope":"members","role_filter":"supply","order":"member","cap":4,
   "element":{
    "name":{"b":"attr","a":"name"},"type":{"b":"attr","a":"type"},"mfm_id":{"b":"attr","a":"mfm_id"},
    "kw":{"b":"col","c":"active_power_total_kw","q":"power","r":2},
    "kva":{"b":"col","c":"apparent_power_total_kva","q":"power","r":2},
    "kvar":{"b":"col","c":"reactive_power_total_kvar","r":2,"keep_sign":true},
    "kwh":{"b":"delta","c":"active_energy_import_kwh","r":1},
    "pf":{"b":"prefer_abs","cs":["kpi_true_pf","power_factor_total"],"r":3},
    "voltage":{"b":"col","c":"voltage_avg","r":1},"current":{"b":"col","c":"current_avg","r":1},
    "load_pct":{"b":"null","why":"no per-feeder rated capacity on gic_*"},
    "breaker_state":{"b":"null","why":"no breaker column in neuract"},
    "status":{"b":"status","policy":"pf_floors","vocab":["normal","warning","critical"]},
    "energized":{"b":"energized"}}},
  {"slot":"widgets.sld.outgoing[]","mode":"elements","scope":"members","role_filter":"load","order":"member","cap":10,
   "element":{"$same_as_slot":"widgets.sld.incoming[]"}},
  {"slot":"widgets.sld.bus","mode":"aggregates","scope":"members","role_filter":"supply",
   "agg":{"kw":{"agg":"sum_magnitude","of":"kw","r":2},
          "voltage":{"agg":"first_nonnull","of":"voltage"},
          "coupler_state":{"agg":"const","v":null}}},
  {"slot":"widgets.header_kpis","mode":"aggregates","scope":"members",
   "agg":{"incoming_kw":{"agg":"sum_magnitude","of":"kw","role_filter":"supply","r":2},
          "outgoing_kw":{"agg":"sum_magnitude","of":"kw","role_filter":"load","r":2},
          "avg_pf":{"agg":"mean","of":"pf","role_filter":"all","r":3},
          "incoming_count":{"agg":"len","role_filter":"supply"},
          "outgoing_count":{"agg":"len","role_filter":"load"},
          "main_mfm_kw":{"agg":"alias","of":"incoming_kw"}}},
  {"slot":"widgets.header_status","mode":"aggregates","scope":"members","role_filter":"all",
   "agg":{"critical":{"agg":"count_status","status":"critical"},
          "warning":{"agg":"count_status","status":"warning"},
          "normal":{"agg":"count_status","status":"normal"}}}
 ]
}
$j$::jsonb, 'was topology_sld.py render():296 + _sld_node:205 + _build_bus:272; caps 4/10 FE-enforced; energized/pf floors via config.feeder_overview')
ON CONFLICT (card_id) DO UPDATE SET handling_class=EXCLUDED.handling_class, roster_spec=EXCLUDED.roster_spec, notes=EXCLUDED.notes, updated_at=now();

-- ── card 161 : SLD Faults & Events Filter (topology_sld, same page/renderer as card 2) ──────
INSERT INTO card_fill_recipe (card_id, handling_class, roster_spec, notes)
SELECT 161, 'topology_sld', roster_spec, 'shares card-2 SLD recipe (renderers/__init__.py: topology_sld cards 2/161); renders honest-empty when its payload lacks widgets.sld'
FROM card_fill_recipe WHERE card_id = 2
ON CONFLICT (card_id) DO UPDATE SET roster_spec=EXCLUDED.roster_spec, notes=EXCLUDED.notes, updated_at=now();

-- ── card 5 : Real Time Monitoring feeder heatmap (panel_aggregate) ──────────────────────────
INSERT INTO card_fill_recipe (card_id, handling_class, roster_spec, notes) VALUES
(5, 'panel_aggregate', $j$
{
 "coverage_attach": "widgets._coverage",
 "slots": [
  {"slot":"heatmap.history","mode":"sections","scope":"members","role_filter":"all","reporting_only":true,
   "group_by":"role","replace":"wholesale",
   "sample":{"label":{"b":"ts_label","fmt":"HH:MM:SS"}},
   "section":{"id":"slug_of_group","label":"title_of_group"},
   "elements_key":"feeders",
   "element":{
    "id":{"b":"slug","a":"name"},"label":{"b":"attr","a":"name"},"shortLabel":{"b":"slug","a":"name"},
    "kw":{"b":"col","c":"active_power_total_kw","q":"power","r":2},
    "pf":{"b":"prefer_abs","cs":["kpi_true_pf","power_factor_total"],"r":3},
    "kva":{"b":"col","c":"apparent_power_total_kva","q":"power","r":2},
    "kvar":{"b":"col","c":"reactive_power_total_kvar","r":2,"keep_sign":true},
    "current":{"b":"col","c":"current_avg","r":1},"voltage":{"b":"col","c":"voltage_avg","r":1},
    "loadPct":{"b":"null","why":"no rated_kva on gic_*"},
    "iUnbalance":{"b":"col","c":"current_unbalance_pct","r":2}},
   "section_agg":{"totalKw":{"agg":"sum_magnitude","of":"kw","r":2},
                  "totalKvar":{"agg":"sum_magnitude","of":"kvar","r":2},
                  "totalKva":{"agg":"sum_magnitude","of":"kva","r":2}}},
  {"slot":"heatmap.selectedSampleIndex","mode":"const","v":0}
 ]
}
$j$::jsonb, 'was panel_aggregate.py _fill_heatmap:544 + _heatmap_sections:521 + _feeder_obj:499; ONE real sample replaces 12 fabricated Storybook samples wholesale')
ON CONFLICT (card_id) DO UPDATE SET handling_class=EXCLUDED.handling_class, roster_spec=EXCLUDED.roster_spec, notes=EXCLUDED.notes, updated_at=now();

-- ── cards 12 & 13 : Energy Input & Distribution rail / Energy Flow (panel_aggregate) ────────
INSERT INTO card_fill_recipe (card_id, handling_class, roster_spec, notes) VALUES
(12, 'panel_aggregate', $j$
{
 "coverage_attach": "widgets._coverage",
 "slots": [
  {"slot":"rail.vm.sources[]","mode":"groups","scope":"members","role_filter":"supply","template":"clone_first",
   "group":{"id":{"b":"slug","a":"name"},"label":{"b":"attr","a":"name"}},"list_key":"meters",
   "element":{"id":{"b":"slug","a":"name"},"label":{"b":"attr","a":"name"},
              "kw":{"b":"col","c":"active_power_total_kw","q":"power","r":2},
              "kwh":{"b":"delta","c":"active_energy_import_kwh","r":1},
              "utilizationPct":{"b":"null","why":"no per-feeder rated capacity on gic_*"}},
   "group_agg":{"totalKw":{"agg":"sum_magnitude","of":"kw","r":2},
                "totalKwh":{"agg":"sum_magnitude","of":"kwh","r":1}}},
  {"slot":"rail.vm.consumers[]","mode":"groups","scope":"members","role_filter":"load","template":"clone_first",
   "group":{"$same_as_slot":"rail.vm.sources[]"},"list_key":"meters",
   "element":{"$same_as_slot":"rail.vm.sources[]"},"group_agg":{"$same_as_slot":"rail.vm.sources[]"}},
  {"slot":"rail.vm.sankey","mode":"sankey_match","scope":"members",
   "match":"slug_containment","link_match":"by_node_id","default_value_kind":"energy",
   "trunk_markers":{"kinds":["stage"],"panel_self":true},
   "member_value":{"energy":{"b":"delta","c":"active_energy_import_kwh","r":1},
                   "power":{"b":"col","c":"active_power_total_kw","q":"power","r":2}},
   "trunk_value":"panel_kwh","entity_value":null}
 ]
}
$j$::jsonb, 'was panel_aggregate.py _fill_meter_rosters:305 + _fill_sankey:358 + _node_role:339; chrome (color/kind/order) preserved via clone_first; ungrounded entity nodes/links honest-null (never duplicated panel total)')
ON CONFLICT (card_id) DO UPDATE SET handling_class=EXCLUDED.handling_class, roster_spec=EXCLUDED.roster_spec, notes=EXCLUDED.notes, updated_at=now();

INSERT INTO card_fill_recipe (card_id, handling_class, roster_spec, notes)
SELECT 13, 'panel_aggregate',
       replace(roster_spec::text, '"rail.vm.', '"flow.vm.')::jsonb,
       'identical to card 12 with root key flow (dual-story disambiguated by Layer 2 exact_metadata)'
FROM card_fill_recipe WHERE card_id = 12
ON CONFLICT (card_id) DO UPDATE SET roster_spec=EXCLUDED.roster_spec, notes=EXCLUDED.notes, updated_at=now();

-- ── card 23 : PQ Issues KPI strip (panel_aggregate) ─────────────────────────────────────────
INSERT INTO card_fill_recipe (card_id, handling_class, roster_spec, notes) VALUES
(23, 'panel_aggregate', $j$
{
 "coverage_attach": "widgets._coverage",
 "thresholds": {"iThd_floor_pct":8.0,"vThd_floor_pct":5.0,"pfGap_floor_pct":5.0,"neutral_floor_a":30.0},
 "slots": [
  {"slot":"strip.stats","mode":"aggregates","scope":"members","role_filter":"load","reporting_only":true,
   "element":{
    "id":{"b":"slug","a":"name"},"panel":{"b":"attr","a":"name"},"table":{"b":"attr","a":"table"},
    "kw":{"b":"col","c":"active_power_total_kw","q":"power","r":2},
    "pf":{"b":"prefer_abs","cs":["kpi_true_pf","power_factor_total"],"r":3},
    "truePf":{"b":"col","c":"kpi_true_pf","r":3},
    "pfGap":{"b":"col","c":"pf_gap_vs_full_load","r":2},
    "iThd":{"b":"phase_mean","cs":["thd_current_r_pct","thd_current_y_pct","thd_current_b_pct"],"r":2},
    "vThd":{"b":"phase_mean","cs":["thd_voltage_r_pct","thd_voltage_y_pct","thd_voltage_b_pct"],"r":2},
    "iThdPk":{"b":"null","why":"no peak-THD column on gic_*"},
    "h3":{"b":"null","why":"no 3rd-harmonic column on gic_*"},
    "h5":{"b":"col","c":"harmonic_5th_pct","r":2},"h7":{"b":"col","c":"harmonic_7th_pct","r":2},
    "kFactor":{"b":"null","why":"no k-factor column on gic_*"},
    "neutralA":{"b":"col","c":"current_neutral","r":1},
    "status":{"b":"status","policy":"pf_floors","vocab":["success","warning","danger"]},
    "driver":{"b":"null","why":"diagnosis label is not a neuract column"},
    "driverKey":{"b":"null","why":"diagnosis label is not a neuract column"}},
   "agg":{"worstIThd":{"agg":"argmax","of":"iThd"},
          "worstVThd":{"agg":"argmax","of":"vThd"},
          "iThd":{"agg":"count_breach","of":"iThd","floor":8.0},
          "vThd":{"agg":"count_breach","of":"vThd","floor":5.0},
          "pfGap":{"agg":"count_breach","of":"pfGap","floor":5.0},
          "neutral":{"agg":"count_breach","of":"neutralA","floor":30.0},
          "total":{"agg":"sum_of","keys":["iThd","vThd","pfGap","neutral"]}}}
 ]
}
$j$::jsonb, 'was panel_aggregate.py _fill_worst_of:450 + _pq_member:250 + _argmax:468 + _count_breach:474; floors editable here (mirror of thresholds key)')
ON CONFLICT (card_id) DO UPDATE SET handling_class=EXCLUDED.handling_class, roster_spec=EXCLUDED.roster_spec, notes=EXCLUDED.notes, updated_at=now();

INSERT INTO card_fill_recipe (card_id, handling_class, roster_spec, notes)

 jsonb_build_object('coverage_attach','widgets._coverage','slots', jsonb_build_array(jsonb_build_object(

-- ── narrative cards 8 / 19 / 25 / 28 : envelope facts ONLY (narrative_ai.py is KEPT) ────────

SELECT v.card_id, 'narrative_ai', $j$
{"mode":"narrative","slots":[],
 "containers":["widgets.ai_summary","data.ai_summary","$top"],
 "fields":{"badge":"prejudged_python_never_ai","text":"ai_narrated_single_sentence"},
 "fallback":"deterministic_template_verbatim_on_any_model_failure"}

 'renderer stays narrative_ai.py + _story/ (LLM path, per Inventory A KEEP list); this row is the envelope contract shown to the AI + gate'
FROM (VALUES (8),(19),(25),(28)) AS v(card_id)
ON CONFLICT (card_id) DO UPDATE SET roster_spec=EXCLUDED.roster_spec, notes=EXCLUDED.notes, updated_at=now();

-- ── FE card_rendering seeds (Inventory B facts) ─────────────────────────────────────────────
INSERT INTO card_rendering (card_id, page_key, render_kind, envelope_kind, component_alias, payload_shape_category, payload_single_key, mapper_key, state_schema, state_defaults, date_control, honest_blank_reason) VALUES
 (2,  'panel-overview-shell/overview-sld-3d',        'special','topology',    'EnergySingleLineDiagram','envelope_only','widgets',NULL,NULL,NULL,'{"kind":"none"}',NULL),
 (5,  'panel-overview-shell/real-time-monitoring',   'compose', NULL,         'RealTimeHeatmapSection','single_unwrap','heatmap','mapFrame','{"metric":"string"}','{"metric":"$heatmap.metric"}','{"kind":"none"}',NULL),
 (6,  'panel-overview-shell/real-time-monitoring',   'compose', NULL,         'LiveScrubberBar','single_unwrap','scrubber',NULL,'{"liveMode":"boolean"}','{"liveMode":true}','{"kind":"none"}','callbacks stubbed (deferred interdependency)'),
 (8,  'panel-overview-shell/real-time-monitoring',   'special','narrative_ai','AiSummary','envelope_only',NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,'{"kind":"none"}','honest-blank when ai_summary missing'),
 (12, 'panel-overview-shell/energy-distribution',    'components',NULL,       NULL,'single_unwrap','rail',NULL,NULL,NULL,'{"kind":"none"}',NULL),
 (13, 'panel-overview-shell/energy-distribution',    'components',NULL,       NULL,'single_unwrap','flow',NULL,NULL,NULL,'{"kind":"none"}',NULL),
 (23, 'panel-overview-shell/harmonics-pq',           'components',NULL,       NULL,'single_unwrap','strip',NULL,NULL,NULL,'{"kind":"none"}',NULL),
 (24, 'panel-overview-shell/harmonics-pq',           'components',NULL,       NULL,'single_unwrap','timeline',NULL,NULL,NULL,'{"kind":"none"}',NULL),
 (26, 'panel-overview-shell/harmonics-pq',           'components',NULL,       NULL,'single_unwrap','table',NULL,NULL,NULL,'{"kind":"none"}',NULL),
 (27, 'panel-overview-shell/harmonics-pq',           'components',NULL,       NULL,'single_unwrap','signature',NULL,NULL,NULL,'{"kind":"none"}',NULL),
 (28, 'individual-feeder-meter-shell/overview',      'special','narrative_ai','AiSummary','envelope_only',NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,'{"kind":"none"}',NULL),
 (60, 'diesel-generator-asset-dashboard/engine-cooling','special','asset_3d', 'ComingSoon3D','envelope_only','object',NULL,NULL,NULL,'{"kind":"none"}','object=null honest V48 state'),
 (160,'panel-overview-shell/real-time-monitoring',   'compose', NULL,         'RealTimeMonitoringFooter',NULL,NULL,'mapAggregateSocketToSnapshot','{"idx":"number","liveMode":"boolean"}','{"idx":0,"liveMode":true}','{"kind":"none"}','payload_required=false; all props derived from liveFrame')
ON CONFLICT (card_id) DO UPDATE SET page_key=EXCLUDED.page_key, render_kind=EXCLUDED.render_kind,
  envelope_kind=EXCLUDED.envelope_kind, component_alias=EXCLUDED.component_alias,
  payload_shape_category=EXCLUDED.payload_shape_category, payload_single_key=EXCLUDED.payload_single_key,
  mapper_key=EXCLUDED.mapper_key, state_schema=EXCLUDED.state_schema, state_defaults=EXCLUDED.state_defaults,
  date_control=EXCLUDED.date_control, honest_blank_reason=EXCLUDED.honest_blank_reason;

-- backfill the ~58 FILL cards from the existing card_render_map (additive; inventoried rows above win)
INSERT INTO card_rendering (card_id, page_key, render_kind, fill_module)
SELECT crm.card_id, crm.page_key, 'fill', crm.fill_module
FROM card_render_map crm
WHERE crm.fill_module IS NOT NULL
ON CONFLICT (card_id) DO NOTHING;

-- backfill remaining direct-render cards as 'components'
INSERT INTO card_rendering (card_id, page_key, render_kind)
SELECT ch.card_id, ch.page_key, 'components'
FROM card_handling ch
ON CONFLICT (card_id) DO NOTHING;

COMMIT;
```

Note on `$same_as_slot`: an intra-row reference resolved by the recipe READER (`card_fill_recipe.py` expands it before anything downstream sees it) — keeps each row human-editable without triple-duplicating the sld_node/meter_obj JSON inside one row. Cross-card duplication (pq_member in 23/24/26/27) is deliberate per the directive (each card row is complete + independently editable); the seed derives 24/26/27 from 23 at seed time only.

---

## 2) AI VOCABULARY SPEC

### 2a. `data_instructions` extension (what the AI emits)

New OPTIONAL top-level key `roster` in `data_instructions` — an array of member-scope slot instructions, one per recipe slot:

```json
"roster": [
  {"slot": "rail.vm.consumers[]",        // MUST equal a slot string from the card's roster_spec (verbatim)
   "scope": "members",                    // literal; the only valid value
   "role_filter": "load",                 // supply|load|all — must match the recipe (or omit → backfilled)
   "group_by": null,                      // null|"role" — must match the recipe (or omit)
   "element": {                           // the AI's ONLY real decision surface: the COLUMN inside each binding
     "kw":  "active_power_total_kw",      // bare string = shorthand for {"b":"col","c":...}; column MUST be in the basket
     "kwh": {"b":"delta","c":"active_energy_import_kwh"},
     "utilizationPct": {"b":"null"}       // honest-null must stay null — AI may NOT bind a column to a recipe-null key
   },
   "agg": {"totalKw":{"agg":"sum_magnitude","of":"kw"}},  // reducers must match the recipe (or omit → backfilled)
   "order": "member",                     // member | "by:-<key>" — recipe default if omitted
   "cap": 10                              // must be ≤ recipe cap (or omit)
  }
]
```

The AI's authority: choosing/confirming the **column** inside `col`/`delta`/`phase_mean`/`prefer_abs` bindings (per run, per basket — e.g. swapping `voltage_avg` for `voltage_ll_avg` if that's what the basket has). Everything structural (slot paths, element keys, group semantics, reducers, floors, caps) comes from the recipe row and is validated, not trusted.

Binding op vocabulary (closed): `col` (latest-row column, `q` quantity for `_verify`, `r` round), `delta` (windowed counter delta), `phase_mean` (mean of listed columns), `prefer_abs` (first non-null of cs[0], else abs(cs[1])), `attr` (member attr: name|role|table|mfm_id|type), `slug`, `status` (policy pf_floors + vocab), `energized`, `ts_label`, `const`, `null`.
Reducer vocabulary (closed): `sum_magnitude`, `mean`, `maximum`, `minimum`, `argmax`, `count_breach` (+`floor`), `sum_of` (+`keys`), `count_status`, `first_nonnull`, `len`, `alias`, `const`.

### 2b. Prompt rule text — append to `/home/rohith/desktop/BFI/backend/layer2/pipeline_v48/layer2/prompts/data_instructions.md` (after the envelope section, ~line 50)

```markdown
## ROSTER (member-scope) slots — panel_aggregate / topology_sld cards ONLY
Some cards render ONE ELEMENT PER PANEL MEMBER (feeder rosters, SLD nodes, heatmap cells, sankey
values). For those cards your context contains a verbatim `roster_spec` — the card's fixed recipe.
Emit `data_instructions.roster`: one entry per recipe slot, copying `slot` EXACTLY.
- You may ONLY change the COLUMN inside a `col`/`delta`/`phase_mean`/`prefer_abs` binding, and only
  to a column present in the DB SCHEMA block. Everything else (slot paths, element keys, role_filter,
  group_by, reducers, floors, caps, order) is FIXED by the recipe — repeat it or omit it (omitted
  parts are backfilled from the recipe).
- A recipe binding of {"b":"null"} is an HONEST-NULL key (the dataset has no such column). NEVER
  bind a column to it. NEVER invent element keys. NEVER emit roster for a card whose context has
  no roster_spec.
- The executor iterates the panel's members itself (supply = role=='incoming', load = everything
  else). You never enumerate members, tables, or per-member values.
Shorthand: an element value may be a bare column name — it means {"b":"col","c":"<column>"}.
```

### 2c. Context wiring (the recipe row shown VERBATIM to the AI)

1. NEW `layer2/catalog/card_fill_recipe.py` (atomic, one concern):
```python
def read(card_id):
    """{handling_class, roster_spec} from cmd_catalog.card_fill_recipe; {} when absent.
    Expands intra-row {"$same_as_slot": "<slot>"} references before returning."""
```
2. `/home/rohith/desktop/BFI/backend/layer2/pipeline_v48/layer2/catalog/card_data_recipe.py` — after the return dict is built (line 26): merge `"roster_spec": card_fill_recipe.read(card_id).get("roster_spec")` (None-safe). (Alternative hook: `catalog_row.py:14`; the card_data_recipe merge keeps the whole recipe under `cr["recipe"]`, which `user_message.py` already reads.)
3. `/home/rohith/desktop/BFI/backend/layer2/pipeline_v48/layer2/emit/user_message.py` — inside the `THIS CARD` block, immediately after the `f"    fields={_recipe_fields(...)}"` line (~line 122):
```python
if rec.get("roster_spec"):
    parts += ["    roster_spec (VERBATIM card recipe — data_instructions.roster MUST conform; "
              "you may only choose the COLUMN inside col/delta/phase_mean/prefer_abs bindings, "
              "from the DB SCHEMA above): "
              + json.dumps(rec["roster_spec"], separators=(",", ":"))]
```

### 2d. Gate additions — `/home/rohith/desktop/BFI/backend/layer2/pipeline_v48/layer2/gates.py` (new function after `gate_data_instructions`, line ~140)

```python
def gate_roster(roster, roster_spec, basket):
    """Validate + normalize data_instructions.roster against the card's card_fill_recipe row.
    Returns (ok, issues, normalized_roster). Recipe row is AUTHORITATIVE; AI only picks columns."""
    real = {c.get("column") for c in (basket.get("columns") or []) if c.get("column")}
    spec_slots = {s["slot"]: s for s in (roster_spec or {}).get("slots") or []}
    issues, normalized = [], []
    if roster and not spec_slots:
        return False, ["roster emitted for a card with no roster recipe"], []
    for i, r in enumerate(roster or []):
        s = spec_slots.get(r.get("slot"))
        if s is None:
            issues.append(f"roster[{i}] slot {r.get('slot')!r} not in card recipe"); continue
        if r.get("scope") not in (None, "members"):
            issues.append(f"roster[{i}] bad scope {r.get('scope')!r}")
        for k in ("role_filter", "group_by", "order"):
            if r.get(k) not in (None, s.get(k)):
                issues.append(f"roster[{i}] {k}={r.get(k)!r} != recipe {s.get(k)!r}")
        if r.get("cap") is not None and s.get("cap") is not None and r["cap"] > s["cap"]:
            issues.append(f"roster[{i}] cap {r['cap']} > recipe cap {s['cap']}")
        # element: keys ⊆ recipe keys; recipe-null keys stay null; every column ∈ basket
        merged = dict(s.get("element") or {})
        for k, v in (r.get("element") or {}).items():
            if k not in merged:
                issues.append(f"roster[{i}].element key {k!r} not in recipe"); continue
            b = {"b": "col", "c": v} if isinstance(v, str) else (v or {})
            if (merged[k] or {}).get("b") == "null" and b.get("b") != "null":
                issues.append(f"roster[{i}].element {k!r} is honest-null in recipe; column binding rejected"); continue
            for c in ([b.get("c")] if b.get("c") else []) + list(b.get("cs") or []):
                if c not in real:
                    issues.append(f"roster[{i}].element {k!r} column {c!r} not in basket (hallucinated)")
            if not issues:
                merged[k] = {**merged[k], **{kk: b[kk] for kk in ("c", "cs") if kk in b}}
        # agg: reducers/floors/keys must equal the recipe's (AI may not move thresholds)
        if r.get("agg") is not None and r["agg"] != (s.get("agg") or r["agg"]):
            for k in r["agg"]:
                if (s.get("agg") or {}).get(k) != r["agg"][k]:
                    issues.append(f"roster[{i}].agg[{k!r}] differs from recipe (thresholds/reducers are fixed)")
        normalized.append({**s, "element": merged})            # recipe wins; AI columns folded in
    # backfill: recipe slots the AI omitted are appended verbatim (deterministic fail-open, META-08 pattern)
    emitted = {r.get("slot") for r in (roster or [])}
    normalized += [dict(s) for slot, s in spec_slots.items() if slot not in emitted]
    return (not issues), issues, normalized
```

Call site — `/home/rohith/desktop/BFI/backend/layer2/pipeline_v48/layer2/build.py` `_finalize()`, after the `gate_data_instructions` call (~line 82):
```python
_rspec = (cr.get("recipe") or {}).get("roster_spec")
ok_r, r_issues, di["roster"] = gate_roster(di.get("roster") or [], _rspec, basket)
failures += r_issues
```
This also implements the deterministic envelope completion: an AI that emits no `roster` still ships the full recipe-derived roster (same pattern as the existing payload_shape/orientation backfill at build.py:64-67).

---

## 3) GENERIC INTERPRETER SPEC

One roster interpreter in `ems_exec`, split per the V48 atomic rule into four single-purpose files. **Hard rule: no card ids, no root-key literals ("rail"/"strip"/"heatmap"/...), no thresholds, no element-key names anywhere in these files** — all of that arrives in `data_instructions.roster` (recipe-validated rows).

### New files

**`ems_exec/executor/members.py`** — member resolution + reads (lifted verbatim from `panel_aggregate.py:84-206`, generalized: column set is a parameter):
```python
def resolve(mfm_id) -> tuple[list[dict], dict]
    # (members, coverage): deduped incomers_of ∪ outgoers_of from registries.neuract.members,
    # each {mfm_id,name,table,role,type}; coverage via data.lt_panels.panel_members → _agg.coverage_verdict.
def rows(members, columns, ts_col=None) -> list[tuple[dict, dict]]
    # one ems_exec.data.neuract.latest() per member table, present-tolerant (absent col → None; no table → {}).
def select(pairs, role_filter="all", reporting_only=False) -> list[tuple[dict, dict]]
    # supply → role=='incoming'; load → role!='incoming'; reporting_only → non-null active-power value.
def agg_row(pairs, window, sum_cols, energy_col) -> dict
    # Σ (sum_magnitude) for sum_cols, mean otherwise, windowed-delta Σ for energy_col; None on empty (never 0).
def panel_kwh(pairs, window, energy_col) -> float | None
```

**`ems_exec/executor/bindings.py`** — the closed 11-op binding evaluator + shared policy:
```python
class Policy:  # built once per run from config accessors (all DB-driven with code defaults)
    pf_good: float; pf_fair: float          # config.feeder_overview.pf_good_min/.pf_fair_min (0.95/0.90)
    flow_threshold_kw: float                 # config.feeder_overview.sld_flow_threshold_kw (1.0)
    verify(value, quantity) -> value|None    # delegates to fill._verify (denorm epsilon + abs convention)

def evaluate(binding, member, row, window, policy) -> Any
    # ops: col | delta | phase_mean | prefer_abs | attr | slug | status | energized | ts_label | const | null
def slugify(x) -> str | None                 # moved from panel_aggregate._slug:295 (generic normalizer)
```

**`ems_exec/executor/reducers.py`** — closed reducer vocabulary, math delegated to `ems_exec/renderers/_agg.py` (KEEP):
```python
def reduce(agg_spec, elements, *, context=None) -> Any
    # sum_magnitude | mean | maximum | minimum | argmax | count_breach | sum_of | count_status
    # | first_nonnull | len | alias | const ; 'panel_kwh' resolved from context. All honest-null on empty.
```
(`_argmax`/`_count_breach` move here from `panel_aggregate.py:468/474` — they are generic.)

**`ems_exec/executor/roster.py`** — THE interpreter:
```python
def run_roster(payload, roster, ctx, default_payload=None) -> dict
    """Interpret validated roster slot-instructions against the panel in ctx.
    ctx = {asset_table, mfm_id, db_link?, window?, asset_name?}. Never raises (honest-degrade per slot).
    Flow: members.resolve(ctx['mfm_id']) → members.rows(members, cfg('roster.member_columns')+[ts]) →
    for each slot: _run_slot(...) → attach coverage at roster_spec.coverage_attach path."""

def _run_slot(payload, spec, all_pairs, window, policy, panel_ctx, default_payload) -> None
    # dispatch on spec['mode'] — the ONLY branch in the file, on the closed MODE vocabulary:
    #  elements     : [evaluate-all-element-keys per member] → order → cap → write at slot path
    #  groups       : per member: clone_first template group (chrome preserved from payload/default),
    #                 set group-key bindings, put element under list_key, apply group_agg reducers
    #  aggregates   : build elements per role_filter, then agg-map of reducers written onto the dict at slot
    #  sections     : group pairs by member[group_by]; per group: section{id,label}, elements_key list,
    #                 section_agg totals; wrap in one sample {label: ts_label binding}; replace wholesale
    #  sankey_match : _sankey(...) — generic fuzzy matcher (below)
    #  const        : write spec['v'] at slot path

def _walk(payload, path)  # dotted path resolver; supports trailing '[]' (array target) and '[*]'
                          # (repeat-into-every-existing-element, e.g. timeline.periods[*].panels[])
                          # honest: absent container → graft from default_payload or skip (never KeyError)

def _sankey(sankey, spec, pairs, panel_kwh, panel_slugs, window, policy) -> None
    # node role by slug containment vs member slugs (member|trunk|entity; trunk = kind in
    # spec.trunk_markers.kinds OR label slug-matches panel_ctx slugs); member → member_value binding
    # (energy vs power per node), trunk → panel_kwh, entity → None; links matched by node id:
    # member-endpoint → member energy, trunk-to-trunk → panel_kwh, ungrounded → None.
```

Bucketed trend fan-out: move `_member_bucketed:569 / _rolled_series:585 / _fill_bucketed_series:595` verbatim into a fifth atomic file **`ems_exec/executor/series.py`** (they are already generic — driven by `di.fields` kind=bucketed + `_SUM_COLS`→`cfg('roster.sum_columns')`; zero card knowledge).

### Hook into `fill()` — `/home/rohith/desktop/BFI/backend/layer2/pipeline_v48/ems_exec/executor/fill.py:386`

At the end of `fill()` (after the existing fields loop + default-payload graft, before return), add the ONE seam:
```python
roster = (data_instructions or {}).get("roster") or []
if roster and (ctx or {}).get("mfm_id") is not None and _cfg("roster.interpreter_enabled", "off") != "off":
    from ems_exec.executor import roster as _roster
    out = _roster.run_roster(out, roster, ctx, default_payload=default_payload)
```
Scalar/KPI leaves keep flowing through the existing `_agg_row` seam (fill.py:397-398) — the interpreter can supply that row too: when roster is active, `run_card` computes `ctx["_agg_row"] = members.agg_row(...)` so the fields loop works unchanged.

Plumbing: `ems_exec/serve/run.py` — `build_ctx(asset_table, *, db_link=None, window=None, mfm_id=None, asset_name=None)`; `run_card(..., mfm_id=None, asset_name=None)`. `host/server.py:_fill` (line ~310) passes `mfm_id=reg_mfm, asset_name=asset_name` into `run_card` for ALL cards (harmless for single-meter cards: no roster → no-op). End state: delete `'panel_aggregate','topology_sld'` from `_SPECIAL_KINDS` (`host/server.py:238`) — those classes then take the ordinary `run_card` path.

## 4) MIGRATION PLAN

### Phase 0 — storage + AI wiring (no executor change)
1. Apply `db/roster_recipe_schema.sql` + `db/seed_roster_recipes.sql` (psql, ON_ERROR_STOP, re-runnable).
2. Add `layer2/catalog/card_fill_recipe.py`; merge into `card_data_recipe.read()` (line 26); show in `user_message.py` (~line 122); add `gate_roster` (`gates.py` ~140) + build.py call/backfill (~line 82).
3. Verify: run the L2 harness on a panel prompt; confirm the prompt contains `roster_spec`, the emission gate passes, and `data_instructions.roster` is fully populated (backfilled) even when the AI omits it.

### Phase 1 — interpreter in SHADOW mode
4. Add `ems_exec/executor/{members,bindings,reducers,roster,series}.py` + fill()/run_card/host plumbing. Set `app_config roster.interpreter_enabled='shadow'`: `host/server.py:_fill` still routes via `run_special`, but ALSO runs the run_card+roster path and logs both payloads per card to `outputs/logs/roster_shadow/<run_id>/<card_id>.{old,new}.json`.

### Phase 2 — per-card cutover (verify each before deleting its builder)
Order (simplest recipe machinery first, each step exercises one new interpreter mode):

| Step | Cards | New interpreter capability proven | Builder path retired |
|---|---|---|---|
| 1 | 26, 27 | `elements` mode + pq element bindings | `_fill_panels_array` branch of `_fill_per_member` |
| 2 | 24 | `[*]` repeat-per-period | timeline branch |
| 3 | 23 | `aggregates` + argmax/count_breach/sum_of | `_fill_worst_of` |
| 4 | 5 | `sections` (group_by role) + wholesale replace + ts_label | `_fill_heatmap` |
| 5 | 12, 13 | `groups` (clone_first chrome) + `sankey_match` | `_fill_meter_rosters` + `_fill_sankey` |
| 6 | 2, 161 | multi-slot SLD (elements+aggregates+bus) + status/energized policy | ALL of `topology_sld.py`; remove `'topology_sld'` from `_SPECIAL_KINDS` |
| 7 | — | flip `'panel_aggregate'` out of `_SPECIAL_KINDS` (host/server.py:238); `roster.interpreter_enabled='on'` | `panel_aggregate.render` |

Per-card acceptance rule: canonical-JSON equality of shadow old/new payloads across ≥3 logged runs per card (a real-data panel, a partial-coverage panel, an orphan panel) — timestamps excluded via the `ts_label` leaf only. Only then delete that card's builder branch.

### Deletion list (once Phase 2 completes)

`/home/rohith/desktop/BFI/backend/layer2/pipeline_v48/ems_exec/renderers/panel_aggregate.py` — **DELETE ENTIRE FILE**. Per-function disposition:
- DELETE (bespoke, replaced by recipe rows + interpreter): module constants `:41-69` (→ app_config `roster.*`), `_meter_obj:237`, `_pq_member:250`, `_status:276`, `_fill_meter_rosters:305`, `_node_role:339`, `_fill_sankey:358`, `_is_energy_node:420`, `_match_member:426`, `_fill_panels_array:440`, `_fill_worst_of:450`, `_row_time_label:486`, `_feeder_obj:499`, `_heatmap_sections:521`, `_fill_heatmap:544`, `render:637`, `_fill_per_member:685`, `_card_payload:721`, `_attach_coverage:731`, `_window_of:743`.
- MOVE (generic; destination in §3): `_resolve_members:84`→members.resolve, `_member_type:114`, `_ts_col:122`, `_member_rows:131`→members.rows, `_reporting_pairs:145`/`_load_pairs:152`/`_supply_pairs:159`→members.select, `_agg_row:168`→members.agg_row, `_panel_energy_kwh:193`→members.panel_kwh, `_iThd:211`/`_vThd:216`/`_pf:220`/`_energy_meter:228`→bindings ops, `_slug:295`→bindings.slugify, `_argmax:468`/`_count_breach:474`→reducers, `_member_bucketed:569`/`_rolled_series:585`/`_fill_bucketed_series:595`→series.py, `_num:72`/`_round:76`→bindings.

`/home/rohith/desktop/BFI/backend/layer2/pipeline_v48/ems_exec/renderers/topology_sld.py` — **DELETE ENTIRE FILE** (card 2/161 = recipe rows): `render:296`, `_sld_node:205`, `_build_bus:272`, `_side_members:178`, `_leaf_tables:167`, `_node_kwh:150`, `_sum_kw:233`, `_avg_pf:241`, `_first_voltage:248`, `_status_counts:257`, `_sum_col:287`, `_empty_widgets:352`; MOVE `_pick_pf:85`/`_energized:95`/`_flow_threshold:104`/`_node_status:112`/`_pf_floors:130` → bindings.Policy/status/energized ops; `_num:69`/`_round:80`/`_window_of:140` duplicates die.

`/home/rohith/desktop/BFI/backend/layer2/pipeline_v48/ems_exec/renderers/__init__.py` — trim `topology_sld, panel_aggregate` from import `:38`, `_BY_KIND :44-…`, `__all__ :106`.
`/home/rohith/desktop/BFI/backend/layer2/pipeline_v48/host/server.py` — `_SPECIAL_KINDS :238` → `("asset_3d","narrative_ai")`; stale panel_aggregate comment block `:303-307`.
**KEEP** (per Inventory A): `ems_exec/renderers/_agg.py` (pure math), `narrative_ai.py` + `_story/` (LLM path), `asset_3d.py`, `fuel_anatomy.py`, `fill.py`.

### FE simplification steps (Inventory B)
1. `card_rendering` seeded (§1). 2. Auto-generate the four index maps (`components.ts` aliases, `special.tsx`/`compose.tsx`/FILL-glob entries) from `card_rendering` rows via a build-time codegen script (imports stay literal in generated .tsx — Vite requirement). 3. `registry.tsx renderCmd()` → single switch on the row's `render_kind` (fetched once per page load) instead of probing 4 maps in order. 4. FILL barrels, per-card useState, zero-default VMs, CMD_V2 mapper imports stay as code (see §5).

### Verification harness
```bash
# apply (idempotent, re-runnable)
timeout 120 psql "$CMD_CATALOG_DSN" -v ON_ERROR_STOP=1 -f /home/rohith/desktop/BFI/backend/layer2/pipeline_v48/db/roster_recipe_schema.sql
timeout 120 psql "$CMD_CATALOG_DSN" -v ON_ERROR_STOP=1 -f /home/rohith/desktop/BFI/backend/layer2/pipeline_v48/db/seed_roster_recipes.sql
# gates + emit + executor unit tests
cd /home/rohith/desktop/BFI/backend/layer2/pipeline_v48 && timeout 600 python -m pytest tests/ -q
# per-card shadow diff (Phase 2 acceptance; tools/shadow_diff.py = ~40-line canonical-JSON differ over outputs/logs/roster_shadow/)
timeout 120 python tools/shadow_diff.py --card 26 --runs 3
# page-level render truth (existing harness)
timeout 120 python outputs/verify_pages.py            # 4 feeder + 5 panel-overview pages: card counts + no_data audit
# live smoke per page through the host (:8770)
timeout 120 curl -s localhost:8770/api/run -X POST -d '{"prompt":"energy distribution for PCC-1A"}' | python -m json.tool | head -50
```

---

## 5) RISKS — what genuinely cannot move, and where it lives instead

1. **Vite compile-time component imports (FE).** `import {X} from "@cmd-v2/…"` must exist in bundled .tsx. Lives: generated index files (`components.ts` etc.) produced FROM `card_rendering` rows; the DB names components, code imports them.
2. **Physics/dataset conventions.** Reverse-CT abs (`negative_power_convention`), denorm epsilon, the supply-exclusion double-count guard, energy-delta clamp ≥0, Σ-vs-mean quantity classes. These are dataset semantics, not card facts — they live in `_agg.py` + `bindings.Policy` + existing `data_quality_policy`/`app_config` rows (`roster.sum_columns`). Putting them per-card would invite silent physics drift.
3. **Narrative LLM path (cards 8/19/25/28).** Badge pre-judgement + per-page fact builders + fallback templates are code (`narrative_ai.py`, `_story/`) — story logic, not bindings. The recipe row only records the envelope contract for the AI/gate.
4. **Sankey matching is heuristic.** Slug-containment matching is generic interpreter code; the trunk marker (`kind='stage'`) is a CMD_V2 payload convention carried in the recipe row. Risk: a CMD_V2 template rename silently degrades node matching to entity/None — the gate cannot catch this; only the shadow-diff/verify_pages harness can. Mitigation: keep honest-null-on-unmatched (current defect-fix behavior), never a duplicated total.
5. **FE zero-defaults + local state.** Each FILL card's zero-default VM and useState shape is bound to its CMD_V2 component contract — stays per-card code; `card_rendering.state_schema` documents it but does not drive it.
6. **Card 24 per-bucket history is not real yet.** Recipe honestly declares `repeat:'snapshot_per_period'`; upgrading needs a `series`-mode roster slot later — do not block cutover on it.
7. **Seed application path.** `data.db_client.q()` is a 2-arg SELECT-only client; seeds go through psql like the pending `db/seed_*.sql` set (user-applied, consistent with the backend2-parity-port pattern).
8. **Card 13 dual-story.** Interpreter only fills slot paths that exist in the L2-chosen exact_metadata (`_walk` skips absent containers), so the flow/rail story choice stays with Layer 2 — same behavior as today's root-key probing, but declared.
9. **Cross-row duplication drift** (pq_member repeated in 23/24/26/27, sld_node in 2/161). Deliberate per the directive (rows independently editable); the shadow harness plus a one-line SQL audit (`SELECT card_id, roster_spec->'slots'->0->'element' ...`) detects unintended divergence.
10. **AI overreach is structurally impossible**, not just discouraged: `gate_roster` folds AI emissions INTO the recipe row (recipe wins on every structural field, honest-nulls are uncolonizable), and the backfill ships the pure recipe when the AI stays silent — so the worst AI failure mode equals today's deterministic builder output.

Key file paths: `/home/rohith/desktop/BFI/backend/layer2/pipeline_v48/db/roster_recipe_schema.sql` + `db/seed_roster_recipes.sql` (new, §1) · `layer2/catalog/card_fill_recipe.py` (new) · `layer2/catalog/card_data_recipe.py:26` · `layer2/emit/user_message.py:122` · `layer2/gates.py:140` · `layer2/build.py:82` · `layer2/prompts/data_instructions.md` · `ems_exec/executor/{members,bindings,reducers,roster,series}.py` (new) · `ems_exec/executor/fill.py:386` · `ems_exec/serve/run.py` · `host/server.py:238,310` · deletions: `ems_exec/renderers/panel_aggregate.py`, `ems_exec/renderers/topology_sld.py`, `ems_exec/renderers/__init__.py:38,44,106`.
